name: Opus SoundBed
blurb: A full-body vibro-acoustic bed with transducers mapped to the body's energy centers — head, heart, belly, root, feet. Sound becomes something you feel in the bones, not just hear.

name: Ammortal
blurb: The Ammortal Chamber layers red light, PEMF, molecular hydrogen, breathwork, and vibro-acoustics into one guided reset — a full-system tune-up for body and nervous system.

name: Shiftwave
blurb: A chair that pairs sound with rhythmic pressure waves to move the body out of fight-or-flight in minutes — a fast doorway into a settled, parasympathetic state.

name: Bioharmonics
blurb: Harmonic resonance technology that tunes the body with precise frequency and sound — restoring coherence and a felt sense of order from the inside out.
